description.value:
March-drill cadence cut into the fuller — Beinmark drill-masters notch cadence-marks into training weapons to help soldiers keep rhythm; the marks are never removed when the blade is sharpened for war, and they keep a different rhythm now — the body's own.

Effect: At the start of each encounter, you gain temporary Stamina equal to your Might score.

Rules: Temporary Stamina; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least quality craft; a drill-cadence notch-set from a serving Beinmark drill-master
project.source: March-drill cadence cut into the fuller (Beinmarksmål)
